strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering (2006–present) spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded and high-scale infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — building MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows — directly matching the role's AI builder/code fluency preference

Proven entrepreneurial track record: founded and sustains GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform adopted by Green Map), plus multiple self-initiated tools, libraries, workshops and conference talks demonstrating the inspire-and-share leadership the role calls for
concerns: Career titles top out at Senior/Staff engineer; no formal Director-level or principal-scope role on record
AI/ML depth is recent and tooling-focused (MCP, agent frameworks) rather than recognized expertise with shipped AI products or platforms at scale
Holds bachelor's degrees only, missing the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering experience
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and cloud-native fluency
Entrepreneurial founder experience and public knowledge-sharing

response.justification: The candidate brings roughly two decades of demonstrably versatile engineering — from low-latency DLang microservices handling millions of requests per second to Kubernetes-deployed platforms, AWS/CDK product work, and current AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generation. This is precisely the builder-fluent, cross-stack profile the role seeks for identifying and prototyping strategic AI opportunities. His founder experience with GISCollective, sustained open-source contributions, and a strong record of workshops, courses and conference talks evidence the ability to advise partners and inspire others through disruptive technical endeavors. While his titles have been Senior/Staff rather than Director-level, the breadth, self-direction and recent AI focus make a credible case that he operates with the innovation-driven autonomy this principal role requires.
